2604.11554.title: Relax: An Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning Engine for Omni-Modal Post-Training at Scale
2604.11554.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training has proven effective at unlocking reasoning, self-reflection, and tool-use capabilities in large language models. As models extend to omni-modal inputs and agentic multi-turn workflows, RL training systems face three interdependent challenges: heterogeneous data flows, operational robustness at scale, and the staleness -- throughput tradeoff. We present \textbf{Relax} (Reinforcement Engine Leveraging Agentic X-modality), an open-source RL training engine that addresses these challenges through three co-designed architectural layers. First, an \emph{omni-native architecture} builds multimodal support into the full stack -- from data preprocessing and modality-aware parallelism to inference generation -- rather than retrofitting it onto a text-centric pipeline. Second, each RL role runs as an independent, fault-isolated service that can be scaled, recovered, and upgraded without global coordination. Third, service-level decoupling enables asynchronous training via the TransferQueue data bus, where a single staleness parameter smoothly interpolates among on-policy, near-on-policy, and fully asynchronous execution. Relax achieves a 1.20$\times$ end-to-end speedup over veRL on Qwen3-4B on-policy training. Its fully async mode delivers a 1.76$\times$ speedup over colocate on Qwen3-4B and a 2.00$\times$ speedup on Qwen3-Omni-30B, while all modes converge to the same reward level. Relax supports R3 (Rollout Routing Replay)~\cite{ma2025r3} for MoE models with only 1.9\% overhead, compared to 32\% degradation in veRL under the same configuration. It further demonstrates stable omni-modal RL convergence on Qwen3-Omni across image, text, and audio, sustaining over 2{,}000 steps on video without degradation. Relax is available at https://github.com/rednote-ai/Relax.
2604.11554.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）後訓練已被證明能有效解鎖大型語言模型的推理、自我反思和工具使用能力。隨著模型擴展至全模態輸入和代理多回合工作流程，RL訓練系統面臨三個相互依賴的挑戰：異質數據流、規模下的操作穩健性，以及過時性與吞吐量的權衡。我們提出了\textbf{Relax}（強化引擎利用代理X模態），這是一個開源的RL訓練引擎，通過三個共同設計的架構層來解決這些挑戰。首先，\emph{全原生架構}將多模態支持構建到整個堆棧中——從數據預處理和模態感知並行性到推理生成——而不是將其改裝到以文本為中心的管道上。其次，每個RL角色作為獨立的、故障隔離的服務運行，可以在不需要全局協調的情況下進行擴展、恢復和升級。第三，服務級解耦通過TransferQueue數據總線實現異步訓練，其中單一的過時性參數在策略執行、近似策略執行和完全異步執行之間平滑插值。Relax在Qwen3-4B的策略訓練中實現了相較於veRL的1.20$\times$端到端加速。其完全異步模式在Qwen3-4B上提供了相較於共同放置的1.76$\times$加速，而在Qwen3-Omni-30B上則提供了2.00$\times$的加速，同時所有模式都收斂到相同的獎勵水平。Relax支持R3（回放路由重播）~\cite{ma2025r3}，對於MoE模型的額外開銷僅為1.9\%，而在相同配置下，veRL的降級則高達32\%。它進一步展示了在Qwen3-Omni上跨圖像、文本和音頻的穩定全模態RL收斂，並在視頻上持續超過2{,}000步而不降級。Relax可在https://github.com/rednote-ai/Relax獲得。
2604.11554.author: Liujie Zhang et.al.
2604.11554.authors: Liujie Zhang, Benzhe Ning, Rui Yang, Xiaoyan Yu, Jiaxing Li, Lumeng Wu, Jia Liu, Minghao Li, Weihang Chen, Weiqi Hu, Lei Zhang
